name: Hot Chili Limited
description: Hot Chili Limited is an Australia-based copper exploration and development company. The company's flagship asset is the Costa Fuego copper-gold project, located in the low-altitude coastal range of the Atacama Region in Chile. Costa Fuego is one of the largest undeveloped copper resources on the ASX, combining the Cortadera porphyry deposit and the Productora copper-gold deposit. Hot Chili is focused on developing Costa Fuego into a major, low-altitude, multi-decade copper-gold producing operation.
